_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Knockdown of STAT3 and Ref-1 reduced proliferation of these cells and the effects on cell growth were more pronounced with Ref-1 siRNA compared to STAT3 siRNA
details: Knockdown of STAT3 and Ref-1 reduced proliferation, with more pronounced effects from Ref-1 siRNA compared to STAT3 siRNA
